message:
perf(ansi): Eliminate write! macro overhead in cursor functions

Replace write! macro with direct byte writes in cursor position and
cursor movement functions. The write! macro has formatting overhead
even for simple integers.

Added write_u32_decimal() helper with fast paths for common cursor
positions (1-3 digits) and stack-allocated buffer for larger values.

Benchmark improvements:
- ansi_cell_by_cell_80x24: 30% faster (305µs → 226µs)
- ansi_simple_text: 22% faster
- ansi_styled_multiline: 13% faster
- full_cycle_with_ansi: 12% faster

Isomorphism: Output bytes are identical (verified via snapshot tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
